expectations.text: Hero contains an animated bakery visual (rising bread, steam, flying pastries)
expectations.evidence: Hero uses static 🍞 emoji — no bread SVG, no steam animation, no flying pastries
hero and header use #1a0f05 dark brown — partial credit; body is #faf7f2 cream

expectations.text: Uses warm amber/golden accent color appropriate for food/bakery
expectations.evidence: #f59e0b amber used for logo, order button, accent elements

expectations.text: Hero headline is 10 words or fewer
Headline is specific to sourdough, not generic
expectations.evidence: 'Portland's Sourdough' is specific — mentions the city and the product type

expectations.text: Stats section with at least 3 numbers
Product grid with at least 4 cards
Final CTA/delivery section with form and button
expectations.evidence: Delivery section with email input and Order Now button

expectations.text: Copy mentions Portland for local identity
expectations.evidence: Headline says 'Portland's Sourdough'; footer says Portland, OR
No @keyframes defined anywhere in the CSS
